creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
I had the same problem on several systems running 6.3-RELEASE, and this 
workaround did the trick for me as well.  Thanks for posting...

Also see this thread:

http://groups.google.com/group/lucky.freebsd.questions/browse_thread/thread/5dafc9d46e2b7086

At least in my case it was caused by Xorg crashing.

	Jason
